Simplifying Passive Real Estate Investing for IT Leaders
We coach you to achieve financial freedom
Free “Portfolio Management 101” special report
Grow your wealth passively by investing in real estate syndications
Get Your Copy Now
Join SAMO Club to gain access to valuable member-only resources, exclusive investment opportunities and to begin building wealth for yourself and future generations.
Join The Club
WHY JOIN SAMO INVESTING CLUB?
BUILD WEALTH PASSIVELY
We guide investors on how to build wealth by passively investing in real estate.
RECEIVE LUCRATIVE RETURNS
We teach you how to hand-pick performing assets.
LEVERAGE TAX ADVANTAGES AND DIVERSIFICATION
We lead by example. We invest in assets that depreciate and take advantage of passive losses where possible. You pick your investments after learning with us and tap into your new expertise.
SAMO FINANCIAL IS A PROUD SUPPORTER OF THE FOLLOWING CHARITIES
HERE’S HOW THE SAMO CLUB WORKS
JOIN THE CLUB
1
by completing a short application
LET’S TALK
2
to get to know your specific goals and to start learning how to identify potential investment opportunities to suit your goals
TAKE ACTION
3
Invest in the syndications that align with your goals. We are here to support you on your investing journey
REAP THE REWARDS
4
Enjoy doing what you love best while you’re investing and building wealth passively
TESTIMONIALS
Cases of Success
“Working with Alina was the most awesome experience! Whenever we have any questions on the investment, she was on it with emails or text messages. We are definitely investing in more syndications. Thank you Alina!”
Derrick K
Investor
“I know Alina Trigub for over 2 years. During this time, together with my two partners, we have invested into 3 projects offered by Alina. Alina has proven herself as a very knowledgeable and experienced real estate professional who is very approachable and pleasure to work with. Alina does a great job handpicking right quality diversified investment opportunities and is very thorough and transparent with explaining every little detail of the presented deal.  After the deal is closed she remains very engaged, providing regular progress updates. My partners and I are very happy with Alina’s services. Performance of our investments matches and in some cases exceeds the projections, which is great too. After my first deal I have referred Alina to a friend of mine who is a seasoned RE investor himself and after thorough considerations he went forward with investing in one of the projects and also highly regarded Alina’s expertise and services. “
Eugene S
Investor
“Alina Trigub was introduced to me via another real estate investor. Alina spoke at my monthly meetup for women in New Jersey, WWWIRE, and was fantastic. She broke down passive investing giving my group a detailed but not overwhelming look at how passive investing can increase the diversity in one’s real estate investment portfolio as well as help women who do not have the time to pursue active real investing. Alina is professional and approachable. I was so inspired by her talk and information; I have reached out to her to increase my passive investing with my real estate. Thanks so much for being our meetup speaker for Women Who Want to Invest In Real Estate.”
Risha W
Investor
“Working with Alina was the most awesome experience! Whenever we have any questions on the investment, she was on it with emails or text messages. We are definitely investing in more syndications. Thank you Alina!”
